title: CDAREgressPackage
description: Schema for the manifest file produced by dqar-client-kit and consumed by dqar-aidbox.

engagement_id.description: Engagement identifier matching the engagement config name.

ol_run_id.description: EXT 7 value — OpenLineage run ID UUID v4 set by the pipeline orchestrator.

pipeline_id.description: EXT 6 value — three-level run/feed/batch traceability string.

extract_date.description: ISO date of the Bulk FHIR export.

us_core_version.description: US Core version declared by the client FHIR server.

pseudonymization_tool.description: Tool used for PHI redaction, e.g. miracum/fhir-pseudonymizer.

pseudonymization_config_version.description: Version of the anonymization.yaml config used.

resource_counts.description: Resource type to line count in the pseudonymized extract.

stage1_reports.description: Paths to stage 1 conformance reports included in the package.

feed_manifest_included.description: Whether feed-manifest.json is included in the package.
